description: QA_REPORT.md net #5 — make every SDK upgrade a visible PR.

packageRules.description: High-risk SDKs that have caused customer-visible regressions: separate, never grouped, never auto-merged.
prBodyNotes: :warning: This package has historically caused silent regressions on upgrade (Vercel Blob v2 dropped 'private', SimpleWebAuthn v13 nested credential, Resend snake_case → camelCase, etc.). Read the changelog before merging.

packageRules.description: Type-only deps and dev deps can be auto-merged after CI green.
Pin Node engine major to avoid surprise CI runtime jumps.
